title: verbascum × schaklavense
intro: Verbascum × schaklavense, also known as the hybrid Mullein or Schaklovsky's Mullein, is a cross between Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum lychnitis. This biennial plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high mucilage content. The health benefits of Verbascum × schaklavense include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
